title: Chinese Roasted Garlic Noodles
description: A simple and flavorful noodle dish that combines the richness of roasted garlic with the savory flavors of Chinese cuisine.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced green onions and cook until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the roasted garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and sesame oil to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with sesame seeds.
